arguments.argument:
if hitWaterPlat=0 { playSound(global.snd_Splash,0,1,42000) visible=0 bulletSpeed=16 hitWaterPlat=1
tEffect=instance_create(other.x+24,other.y+12,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sGroundDust; tEffect.image_speed=0.3+random(0.2) tEffect.image_xscale=1.5; tEffect.image_yscale=-1.5; tEffect.image_blend=c_teal tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0 idToLift=other.id }
